title: torresia fraseri
intro: Torresia fraseri, also known as Fraser's Torreya, is a species of coniferous evergreen tree native to the southeastern United States. Traditionally, the plant's seeds have been used in herbal medicine, particularly for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Torresia fraseri include its ability to aid in the relief of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the seeds are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness their medicinal properties, although caution is advised due to potential toxicity and the need for proper preparation and dosage.
